label: Layout
description: Defines a procedural layout composed of weighted room types, global scatter and fill parameters, and generation settings.

roomDefs.label: Room defs
roomDefs.description: Weighted room type entries. Each element name is the LayoutRoomDef defName; scalar text is the weight.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# LayoutWorker subclass that drives layout generation.

clearRoomsEntirely.label: Clear rooms entirely
clearRoomsEntirely.description: When true, all existing contents are cleared from rooms before generation.

canHaveMultipleLayoutsInRoom.label: Can have multiple layouts in room
canHaveMultipleLayoutsInRoom.description: Whether a single room can have multiple sub-layouts applied.

multipleLayoutRoomChance.label: Multiple layout room chance
multipleLayoutRoomChance.description: Probability that a room receives multiple layouts when allowed.

shouldDamage.label: Should damage
shouldDamage.description: Whether generated structures receive random damage after placement.

noRoof.label: No roof
noRoof.description: When true, no roof is placed over rooms in this layout.

adjacentRoomMergeChance.label: Adjacent room merge chance
adjacentRoomMergeChance.description: Probability that adjacent compatible rooms are merged during generation.

borderDoorRemoveChance.label: Border door remove chance
borderDoorRemoveChance.description: Probability that doors on room borders are removed during generation.

minRoomWidth.label: Min room width
minRoomWidth.description: Minimum width in cells for generated rooms.

minRoomHeight.label: Min room height
minRoomHeight.description: Minimum height in cells for generated rooms.

junkScaterrers.label: Junk scatterers
junkScaterrers.description: Things scattered as junk throughout the layout. Each element name is the ThingDef defName. Note: field name preserves the source typo 'junkScaterrers'.

scatterTerrain.label: Scatter terrain
scatterTerrain.description: Terrain patches scattered throughout the layout. Each element name is the TerrainDef defName.

fillEdges.label: Fill edges
fillEdges.description: Things placed along room edges layout-wide. Each element name is the ThingDef defName.

fillInterior.label: Fill interior
fillInterior.description: Things placed across room interiors layout-wide. Each element name is the ThingDef defName.

wallAttachments.label: Wall attachments
wallAttachments.description: Things attached to room walls layout-wide. Each element name is the ThingDef defName.

prefabs.label: Prefabs
prefabs.description: Prefabs placed layout-wide. Each element name is the PrefabDef defName.

parts.label: Parts
parts.description: Room parts applied layout-wide. Each element name is the RoomPartDef defName; scalar text is the chance.
